title: Low Export Keeps Indonesian Small Businesses Safe From Iran War Impact
body: As of 2024, MSMEs made up 15.7% of Indonesia’s non-oil and gas exports.

title: Antam Gold Rebounds to Rp 3.049 Million as Safe-Haven Demand Rises
body: Antam gold rebounds to Rp 3.04 mill per gram after two days of losses as Middle East tensions and a weaker USD lift global bullion price.

title: JCI Surges 1.56% as Wall Street Rally Lifts Asian Markets
body: JCI surged 1.56% at Thursday’s open as Wall Street’s rebound lifted Asian markets, despite ongoing geopolitical tensions and a Fitch outlook

title: Gov't Launches Rp 5 Trillion Subsidized Rice Program to Contain Inflation
body: Indonesia launches Rp5 trillion subsidized rice program for Ramadan, releasing 828,000 tons to keep staple food prices affordable.

title: Indonesia Freezes $859 Million in Shares in Mirae Asset Insider Trading Probe
body: Indonesia freezes Rp14.5 trillion in shares in a probe into alleged insider trading and stock manipulation linked to Mirae Asset Indonesia.

title: Escalating Middle East Conflict Drags Rupiah to Rp 16,892
body: Rupiah closed at Rp 16,892 per dollar on Wednesday as escalating Middle East tensions raised oil supply risks and pressured emerging markets

title: JCI Slumps 4.6% as Fitch Outlook Cut and Middle East War Rattle Markets
body: Indonesia stocks tumbled after Fitch cut the outlook to negative as Middle East tensions rattled global markets.

title: Fitch Sees Fiscal Pressure, Low Revenue as It Cuts Indonesia Outlook
body: Fitch revised Indonesia’s outlook to negative, warning of fiscal pressure, weak state revenue, and rising policy uncertainty.

title: SMBC Indonesia Profit Plunges 82% in 2025 Despite Loan Growth
body: SMBC Indonesia’s net profit plunged 82% to Rp505.55 billion in 2025 as higher operating expenses and provisions outweighed loan growth.

title: Pertamina Activates Mitigation Measures as Middle East Tensions Threaten Oil Supply
body: Pertamina activates alternative and emergency strategies to secure oil supply as Middle East tensions disrupt global energy trade.

title: JCI Plunges 4.32% on Middle East Tensions
body: JCI slid 4.32% by midday while South Korea’s Kospi plunged 9.6%, triggering a trading halt as Middle East tensions rattled Asian markets.

title: Asian Markets Plunge as Iran War Escalates, Kospi Sinks 10%
body: Asian stocks tumble, led by a 10% plunge in South Korea, as oil surges and Iran war fears rattle global markets.

title: Indonesia Pushes Ahead With IDX Demutualization
body: Indonesia accelerates IDX demutualization, starting with private placement before a potential IPO to strengthen governance and transparency.

title: Antam Gold Drops Rp 77,000 on Wednesday as Stronger US Dollar Pressures Global Bullion
body: Antam gold fell to Rp 3.045 million per gram on Wednesday as a stronger US dollar pressured global bullion prices.

title: JCI Drops at Open With Asia Markets Under Pressure From Rising Oil and War Uncertainty
body: Indonesia’s benchmark index fell as Asia markets weakened amid escalating Middle East tensions and rising oil prices.

title: Bling-Bling: Indonesia's Australian Jewelry Imports Soar 634.30%
body: As Australian jewelry imports skyrocket, Indonesia’s trade balance is losing its sparkle.

title: US, Japan Back Indonesia’s Push for Small Modular Nuclear Reactors

title: Indonesia Taps US Crude as 2 Pertamina Tankers Stuck in Persian Gulf
body: Two Pertamina tankers got caught up in the Iran conflict-induced paralysis, but Jakarta has already named US crude as its plan B.

title: Indonesia Raises LPG Imports to 7.8 Million Tons, 70% Sourced from US
body: Indonesia lifts LPG imports to 7.8m tons, with 70% from US, amid Hormuz-related supply risks.
